channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Edwin Sifuna's Rising Popularity as a Potential Ruto Challenger in Kenya's 2027 Election
item.description: The article discusses the growing political influence of Edwin Sifuna, a Nairobi senator, within Kenya's opposition. Sifuna's support among Gen Z voters is seen as a potential threat to President Will...

item.title: Adesuwa Okunbo-Rhodes' journey from investment banking to founding Aruwa Capital and addressing Nigeria's SME funding gap
item.description: Adesuwa Okunbo-Rhodes, who started her global banking career at 18, now drives impactful investments as head of Aruwa Capital. She began her finance career at Lehman Brothers, later moving to J.P. Mor...

item.title: Arthur Fery's Wimbledon Triumph: A British Hopeful's Historic Run
item.description: Arthur Fery, a 23-year-old British tennis player ranked 114th in the world, has defied expectations by reaching the Wimbledon singles quarter-finals as a wildcard entry. His unexpected victory over fo...

item.title: Kerala Debris Slip: Search Continues for Five Missing After Tunnel Construction Site Collapse
item.description: A deadly debris slip occurred at a tunnel road construction site in Wayanad district of Kerala, India, on July 7, 2026, resulting in three fatalities and leaving five people missing. Rescue operations...

item.title: Constitutional Court's NHI Ruling and Its Impact on South Africa's Health Policy
item.description: The article discusses the significance of the Constitutional Court's ruling on South Africa's National Health Insurance (NHI) legislation, emphasizing its role in ensuring proper legislative processes...

item.title: University of Nairobi Graduate Struggles with Job Hunt After 11 Years
item.description: Steve Muikia, a former banker and University of Nairobi Economics graduate, has spent over a decade searching for work without success. Pushed to the wall by mounting debts and unmet basic needs, Muik...

item.title: China Considers Restricting Overseas Access to Advanced AI Models to Protect National Security
item.description: Chinese authorities are reportedly discussing measures to restrict overseas access to their most advanced AI models, including unreleased ones, as part of efforts to safeguard national security and co...

item.title: FBI Director Kash Patel Attends Exclusive MAGA Party and Comments on Work Challenges

item.title: Trump-Backed Crypto Venture Collapses, Investors Lose Millions

item.title: Expedition Uncovers Sunken Ship Quest, Final Vessel of Ernest Shackleton
item.description: An expedition led by the Royal Canadian Geographical Society (RCGS) has captured the first images of the sunken ship Quest, the final vessel of Antarctic explorer Sir Ernest Shackleton. The ship, whic...

item.title: Will Smith and Jada Pinkett Reunite After Years of Secret Separation
item.description: Will Smith and Jada Pinkett Smith have reportedly resumed living together after nearly seven years of secret separation. The couple quietly split in 2016 but kept their relationship private until 2023...

item.title: Ghana and South Africa Postpone Bilateral Talks Amid Anti-Migrant Tensions
item.description: Ghana has postponed planned bilateral meetings with South Africa scheduled for August, citing rising anti-migrant violence in the country. Government spokesperson Felix Kwakye Ofosu stated the violenc...

item.title: Learning to listen to my body after repeated injuries
item.description: The article recounts the author's childhood experiences of breaking their right arm seven times, initially attributing the incidents to bad luck. Over time, they realize the injuries were a signal to ...

item.title: Boeing Boosts Technical Support for Nigerian Airlines’ International Expansion
item.description: The article details how Boeing is pivoting its approach in Nigeria, moving from merely selling aircraft to providing comprehensive technical support and training for local airlines aiming to expand in...

item.title: Trump's Legal Misstep in Avoiding Payment to E. Jean Carroll
item.description: The article discusses a legal error made by Donald Trump's attorneys in their attempt to prevent E. Jean Carroll from receiving a court-ordered payment for sexual abuse. A legal expert, David Edwards,...

item.title: South African Soccer Teams Prepare for European Pre-Season Tours with High-Profile Matches
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs, Orlando Pirates, and Mamelodi Sundowns are embarking on European pre-season tours to strengthen their squads ahead of the new Betway Premiership season. Chiefs will train in Murcia, Spa...

item.title: Quebec's CAQ faces paradox of popular ideas and electoral decline

item.title: Top Waterproof Makeup Products for Summer
item.description: This article highlights six essential waterproof makeup products ideal for summer, offering long-lasting wear against sweat and humidity. It recommends Urban Decay's Face Bond Waterproof Foundation as...
